leadText: Victory Dance (Japanese: しょうりのまい Victory Dance) is a non-damaging Fighting-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Hisuian Lilligant. It can be thought of as a physical-oriented counterpart to Quiver Dance.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Victory Dance raises the user's offensive and defensive stats, in addition to giving a 50% boost to the damage dealt by the user's moves. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Status PP 10 Agile Strong Power — — — Accuracy —% —% —% Action speed modifier Self -2 -3 +5 Target ? ? ? Additional effect Turns 4 3 5 ? ? ? ? Raises the user's offensive and defensive stats The user becomes primed Raises the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Victory Dance raises the user's Attack , Defense , and Speed stats by one stage each.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user performs a dance to usher in victory. This raises the user’s offensive and defensive stats and increases the damage dealt by the user’s moves by 50 percent. S V The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.
